class.name: GDKPackageMount
class.brief_description: Owns a raw XPackage content mount for loose-file access.
class.description: A [GDKPackageMount] is returned by [method GDKPackage.mount_package_async]. It owns the native [code]XPackageMountHandle[/code], exposes the absolute mount root, and closes the handle when [method close] is called or the object is released. Paths resolved from this object are valid only while [member valid] is [code]true[/code].

method.name: get_package_identifier
method.description: Returns the current-session package identifier associated with this mount.

method.name: get_mount_path
method.description: Returns the absolute file-system root for this mounted content package.

method.name: get_package_details
method.description: Returns a copy of the package metadata dictionary captured when the mount was created.

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] while the native package mount handle remains open.

method.name: resolve_path
method.description: Validates [param relative_path] as a package-relative path and returns the absolute path in [code]GDKResult.data[/code]. Absolute paths, Godot [code]res://[/code] or [code]user://[/code] paths, and parent-directory traversal are rejected.

method.name: close
method.description: Closes the native package mount handle. After this succeeds, paths previously resolved from this mount should no longer be used.

members.member: The current-session package identifier associated with this mount.
The absolute file-system root for this mounted content package.
A copy of the package metadata dictionary captured when the mount was created.
Whether the native package mount handle remains open.
